note: Strong first graded slate: monotonic Spearman +0.331 metric->actual across 5000 pool lineups; top decile +41 pts over bottom. Raises the average reliably but does NOT crown the nuke (pool-best lineup sat at 72nd pct by metric; user's 9th-place near-win was mid-pack of 20 by metric). Directionally opposite of sim-ROI (-0.05). One slate -- keep testing.
